description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house set within a densely wooded area, featuring a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The structure is composed of white and gray exterior walls, large glass windows, and several outdoor terraces and balconies. The house includes a swimming pool, visible from the front, and landscaped green spaces around the building. The main entryway is accessible via a paved path and is accentuated by a minimalist design. The rear and sides of the house are surrounded by thick clusters of trees, providing privacy and a natural backdrop. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, natural light, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, outdoor terraces, and a swimming pool, surrounded by dense trees and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, swimming pool, terraces, and dense tree coverage behind the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's geometric structure, flat roof, and the extensive wooded area to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by dense trees, with only the upper part of the house and roof visible above the foliage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's terraces, pool, and the thick tree line wrapping around the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, paved approach, and no visible decorative columns or porch
